# datadog_powerpack (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about an existing powerpack for use in other resources.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) A powerpack name, must match exactly one powerpack.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) ID of the powerpack
